prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约 15246→15348→13459→21894→23242，2024 年因新高考改革科类调整位次大幅后移，2025 年继续后移至约 23242 名，近两年累计后移约 9783 名，呈明显后移趋势；该校在甘肃省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021 年 54 人、2022 年 55 人、2023 年 54 人、2024 年 54 人、2025 年 58 人；2026 年计划大幅扩招至 100 人，较 2025 年增加 42 人，增幅约 72.4%，扩招幅度极大，将显著降低录取竞争强度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北林业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 115 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 113–115 名之间，属全国中上游水平；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及师德师风相关舆情；抖音热度排名第 59 位，评价为较热，短视频平台有一定曝光度；未见明显投档断档记录。偏负面舆情可能轻微抑制报考热情；该校以林业工程、风景园林学等为特色优势学科（第五轮学科评估数据中未收录该校，据公开信息林业工程为 A+、风景园林学为 A+），与招生专业中的林学类、风景园林、木材科学与工程等高度关联，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，该校相关专业招生计划增加；土木建筑类明显劝退。甘肃省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 218700 人，较 2025 年（约 179817 人）增长约 21.6%；按近年比例估算物理类考生约 145654 人，较 2025 年增长约 20%，考生规模扩大将加剧竞争。；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距甘肃省较远，属于跨省招生；在甘肃省招生占比约 0.6%（2025 年），属该校全国招生中的较小份额，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次约 23242 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 72.4%（显著降低竞争）、本省物理类考生增长约 20%（加剧竞争）以及偏负面声誉的轻微抑制作用，扩招效应远大于考生增长效应，预计 2026 年最低录取位次将较 2025 年明显后移。预测最低位次约 33140 名，区间 32640–33640 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 15246 → 15348 → 13459 → 21894 → 23242. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and subject category adjustments, the ranking significantly shifted backward. In 2025, it continued to shift backward to about 23242, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9783 over the past two years, showing a clear backward trend. The university's enrollment plan in Gansu Province for science (physics category) was: 54 in 2021, 55 in 2022, 54 in 2023, 54 in 2024, and 58 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 100, an increase of 42 compared to 2025, an increase of about 72.4%. This substantial expansion will significantly reduce the intensity of admission competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks approximately 115th in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings between 113–115 in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving public opinion related to teacher ethics. Its Douyin popularity ranks 59th, evaluated as relatively hot, with some exposure on short video platforms. No obvious records of admission gaps were found. Slightly negative public opinion may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. The university has distinctive advantages in forestry engineering, landscape architecture, etc. (The fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include this university; according to public information, forestry engineering is A+, landscape architecture is A+), which are highly related to enrollment majors such as forestry, landscape architecture, and wood science and engineering, attracting some applicants for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation continue to be highly recommended, with increased enrollment plans for related majors. Civil engineering and architecture are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (about 179,817). Estimated by recent proportions, physics category candidates are about 145,654, an increase of about 20% compared to 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool will intensify competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Gansu Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Its enrollment share in Gansu Province is about 0.6% (2025), a relatively small share of the university's national enrollment, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 23242, the significant enrollment expansion of about 72.4% in 2026 (significantly reducing competition), the increase of about 20% in local physics category candidates (intensifying competition), and the slight inhibitory effect of negative reputation, the expansion effect far outweighs the candidate growth effect. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 33140, with a range of 32640–33640.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, due to the significant enrollment expansion for science (physics category), the minimum admission ranking is expected to shift backward to about 33140, making admission significantly easier than in 2025. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (32640–33640) should consider this university as a key option, recommending Tier 2 majors as the main focus, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<32640) can focus on applying for popular majors like computer science and electrical engineering; candidates with rankings near the lower limit (>33640) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 2785→2501→2392→2681→3331. From 2021 to 2023, there was a slight upward trend. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and subject category adjustments, the ranking moved back to 2681. In 2025, it further moved back to 3331, with a cumulative backward shift of about 650 places in the last two years. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Gansu Province: 11 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 13 students in 2024–2025. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 11 students, a decrease of 2 students compared to 2025, a drop of about 15.4%, and the enrollment reduction will intensify admission competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks approximately 115th in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving public opinion related to teacher ethics. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 59th, rated as relatively hot. No obvious record of enrollment gaps was observed. Slightly negative public opinion may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. The university has distinctive advantages in forestry engineering, landscape architecture, etc. Among the liberal arts enrollment majors, landscape architecture is directly related to the A+ discipline of landscape architecture, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has socially differentiated and wait-and-see attitudes but has obvious advantages for civil service exams. Business administration category is differentiated and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in Gansu Province is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025. Estimated by recent proportions, history category examinees are about 73,046, an increase of about 25% compared to 2025. The expansion of the examinee scale will intensify competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Gansu Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment. Its enrollment share in Gansu Province is about 0.6% (2025), a small share of the university's national enrollment, and regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 3331, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 15.4% (intensifying competition), and a 25% increase in local history category examinees (intensifying competition), under dual pressure, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2924, with a range of 2424–3424.
